league_tagline: A 14-team competitive dynasty fantasy football league. Two conferences. Six playoff spots. One championship ring.

checklist.title: Create Your Team Brand
checklist.desc: Choose a team name and design a logo before the draft. Contact a commissioner for assistance. Your brand is your dynasty identity — make it count.

checklist.title: Pay League Dues
checklist.desc: $50 due before draft day. First-season members pay for two seasons upfront, ensuring long-term commitment to the league.

checklist.title: Join Sleeper & Discord
checklist.desc: Set up your Sleeper account and join the league Discord. All trade discussions, lineup decisions, and league communication happens there.

checklist.title: Prepare Your Draft Strategy
checklist.desc: Study dynasty rankings, positional scarcity, and rookie values. This is a long-game league — your early-round picks define your dynasty for years.
